Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.desc: They say you come to New Zealand as a stranger, but leave as family. In this episode of DIRT, the crew goes full circle—meeting Muttonbird chefs Emma and George on the South Island before hopping up to Raglan and working their way back down. Water skiing next to snow-capped mountains, cooking in hot springs the Māori way, and stargazing at Wairarapa Dark Sky Reserve are all on the itinerary. But it’s the final “Feed” done Kiwi-style that makes one thing clear—in this unique and stunning land, nobody’s a stranger for long.

programme.desc: We are down to four players at the final table of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic. Also in the hunt, two-time WPT Champion James Carroll, chip leader Bala Patur, and Scott Hempel who with this final table finish will record his largest poker cash to date.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: WPT hits Hollywood, FL to host the Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. This tournament drew a field of 2,482 entrants marking the largest field of any WPT event. The field has narrowed to the final six remaining players with first place receiving $1,260,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Sonny Franco has maintained the chip lead at this final table, but seasoned pro Brek Schutten is right on his heels. Also in the mix are Viet Vo, Steven Snyder, Albert Calderon, and Ken Aldridge as play gets back underway in Hollywood, Florida.

programme.title: World Poker Tour

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: A Future Stolen: Finding Justice for Sade Robinson
programme.desc: In Milwaukee, 19-year-old Sade Robinson has gone missing, and her car is found torched. A trail of evidence across the city shocks the community and leaves her family searching for justice.

programme.title: Stitch: Unplanned Bonds, Lasting Ties
programme.desc: New connections form in the most unlikely places. In this episode, chance encounters forge lasting friendships and transformative relationships.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge: Artists Forge Fine Jewelry Masterpieces
programme.desc: Three jewelry makers in Greenville are about to take on some heavy metal as they go head-to-head to design and build an arm cuff inspired by the Liberty Bridge. Will their designs be too arm-twisting for the judges?

programme.title: Maker Nation: Webs + Pottery
programme.desc: An Omaha home pottery artist, and a spider web-catching jewelry maker in Boston.
